content.text:
{
  "dimension": "intervention-quality",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach's moves are well-matched to live reads and sequenced according to the AoA coaching path. Turn 2 opens with slowing-down and asks for the honest read under the logical one — appropriate before any depth work. Turn 4 reflects back the client's own language ('make decisions without running the math first') and frames an experiment ('any version of the book that could start before the number?') rather than prescribing. Crucially, when the client gets careful and pulls back in turn 5 (mentioning the dad), the coach reads that signal in turn 6 and follows the charge to its origin — exactly the move the territory required. When the client pushed back in turn 7, the coach didn't double down; turn 8 explicitly acknowledged 'I was pushing too hard' and pivoted to a softer, more open invitation. Turns 8 and 10 hold space rather than rushing, and the question 'Is he in it?' is timed to land after the felt connection has been earned. The closing question 'What's the book actually about?' is the right next move at the right moment, allowing the client to locate the original moment himself. The coach earned each step rather than racing ahead, and avoided giving financial advice or evangelizing.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8, 10],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Opens with slow-down and asks for honest read under logical one; slightly over-packed with multiple questions but right kind of move."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Mirrors client's own language; frames an experiment ('any version that could start before the number') rather than prescribing. Good timing."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reads the careful pull-back around dad and follows the charge to its origin — exactly the territory move. Asks 'what would your dad want for you' to open the felt layer."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "When client pushed back, coach acknowledged the over-push and pivoted to softer angle ('has any of the grinding ever felt like it was for him?'). Did not double down."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Holds the moment after client's disclosure; doesn't rush. Then gently asks 'what's the book actually about?' — the perfectly timed opening question that lets client locate the origin himself."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["lets-go-there", "find-the-want-behind-the-should", "money-as-surrogate", "the-want", "childhood-imprinting", "what-makes-you-care-about-the-outcome"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["whats-the-most-profound-positive-shift"],
  "notes": "Turn 2 is a bit list-heavy and risks intellectualizing, but the coach recovered quickly and the subsequent sequence is strong. The pivot in turn 8 after client's pushback is a hallmark of skilled timing."
}
